user.title: Set up HAIR

abort.no_ir_hardware: No IR hardware detected. For capture you need an ESPHome device with the remote_receiver component. For sending you need an integration on HA's native infrared platform (Broadlink, ESPHome, etc.). See the [setup guide]({setup_url}) for details.

init.title: HAIR Options
init.description: Configure global settings for IR device management.

data_description.capture_timeout: How long to wait for an IR signal during capture (5-60 seconds).
data_description.default_repeat_count: Number of times to repeat each IR command transmission (1-10).
